ValidationRule.description: Please enter Closed Reason for Abandoning an opportunity.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND($Setup.Rules_Execution__c.Run__c, NOT(CONTAINS($Profile.Name , 'System Administrator')), RecordType.Name='Informatics', ISPICKVAL(StageName ,'Abandoned'), ISPICKVAL(Closed_Reason__c,'') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_024: Please enter Closed Reason for Abandoned stage.
